output.summary: Implemented all 5 accessibility fixes for QuickLinks block: Added <nav> landmark with aria-label around links column, changed inner blocks wrapper from <div> to <ul>, wrapped each link item in <li> element, removed focus:outline-none from PHP to sync with TSX, and added sr-only '(opens in new tab)' text for external links. Created comprehensive test page content with 7 scenarios covering all edge cases. Build passed successfully with no TypeScript errors. QuickLinks files have no linting errors.

changes: Changed outer <div> wrapper to <nav> with aria-label
Added aria-label using heading attribute or fallback to 'Quick links'
Changed inner blocks wrapper from <div> to <ul>
Changed outer <div> wrapper to <nav> with aria-label
Added aria-label using heading or fallback to 'Quick links'
Wrapped $children echo in <ul> element with gap-4 class
Kept all styling classes on the <li> element
Wrapped entire <a> element in <li> with theme_block_props
Moved styling classes from theme_block_props to <a> element using theme_build_html_attributes
Removed focus:outline-none class (was in PHP but not TSX)
Added sr-only span with '(opens in new tab)' text when opensInNewTab is true

filesCreated.purpose: Test page content with 7 comprehensive scenarios wrapped in DemoContainer blocks

accessibilityFixesApplied.description: Wrapped links column in <nav> element in both TSX and PHP
Changed inner blocks wrapper from <div> to <ul> and wrapped each QuickLinkItem in <li>
Added aria-label to <nav> using heading attribute or 'Quick links' fallback
Removed focus:outline-none from QuickLinkItem.php to sync with TSX
Added sr-only '(opens in new tab)' text for external links in QuickLinkItem.php

warnings: Bundle size warnings (pre-existing, not related to QuickLinks changes)
Linting warnings in other blocks (pre-existing, QuickLinks has no linting errors)
buildStatus.lintStatus: QuickLinks files pass all linting checks

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP structures are fully synchronized. Both use <nav> with aria-label, <ul> for inner blocks wrapper, and <li> for QuickLinkItem wrapper. focus:outline-none removed from PHP to match TSX.

scenarios.title: Full Content
scenarios.description: All fields populated with eyebrow, heading, description, button, and 4 link items

scenarios.title: Minimal Content
scenarios.description: Only heading and one link item

scenarios.title: Long Content Edge Case
scenarios.description: 100+ char heading, long descriptions, long link titles

scenarios.title: Many Link Items (8 Items)
scenarios.description: Tests layout scaling with large number of items

scenarios.title: Single Link Item
scenarios.description: Minimum case with just one link

scenarios.title: Empty Optional Fields
scenarios.description: Tests shouldDisplay() with only heading provided

testPage.notes: WordPress API was unavailable during development. Test page content has been generated and saved to test-page-content.html. The page needs to be created/updated manually when the API is available. All scenarios are wrapped in DemoContainer blocks per new standards.

nextSteps: Test page needs to be created/updated in WordPress when API is available using the content from test-page-content.html
Run functional QA to verify all accessibility improvements
Test with screen readers to verify nav landmark, list semantics, and sr-only text announcements
Test keyboard navigation to verify focus indicators are visible
Verify hover and focus states match across all link items
